task_completion.description: Execute the route2OD.py script with the correct parameters.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Terminal screenshot showing the execution of a command involving 'route2OD.py' (or similar SUMO tool) with arguments pointing to 'pasubio.rou.xml' and an interval of 3600.

task_completion.description: Verify the creation of the aggregated OD matrix file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Terminal output (e.g., from 'ls') or file explorer showing that the file 'pasubio_hourly.od' has been created in the '/home/ga/SUMO_Output/' directory.

task_completion.description: Verify the creation of the peak OD pair text file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Terminal output or file explorer showing that the file 'peak_od_pair.txt' has been created in the '/home/ga/SUMO_Output/' directory.

task_completion.description: Record the correct Origin edge ID in the output file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The content of 'peak_od_pair.txt' (visible via 'cat', 'less', or a text editor) contains the exact Origin edge ID '1[0]' on its own line.

task_completion.description: Record the correct Destination edge ID in the output file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The content of 'peak_od_pair.txt' contains the exact Destination edge ID '40[1]' on its own line.

task_completion.description: Record the correct maximum trip count in the output file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The content of 'peak_od_pair.txt' contains the exact integer '1410' on its own line.

integrity.description: The agent actually executed the SUMO route2OD.py script to generate the OD matrix.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for terminal commands running the python script rather than the agent manually creating the 'pasubio_hourly.od' file with mock data.

integrity.description: The agent performed actual analysis to find the peak OD pair.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for commands like 'sort', 'awk', 'grep', or a custom Python script used to parse the OD matrix and find the maximum value, rather than magically knowing the answer.

integrity.description: The agent did not just hardcode the final answers without deriving them.
integrity.visual_evidence: Ensure the agent did not simply type 'echo "1[0]\n40[1]\n1410" > peak_od_pair.txt' as their very first action without prior analysis steps.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The correct ground truth peak Origin-Destination (OD) edge pair for the first hour (interval 0.0 to 3600.0) is Origin '1[0]' to Destination '40[1]' with exactly 1410 trips. The expected OD matrix file is /home/ga/SUMO_Output/pasubio_hourly.od and the analysis file is /home/ga/SUMO_Output/peak_od_pair.txt.
